./cli/internal/agent/testdata/reviewer/bead-jsonl-oversized-line.jsonl:1:{"acceptance":"- [ ] JWT middleware installed in data-plane router as optional layer (runs when Authorization header present)\n- [ ] JwtIssuer constructed at startup in serve.rs (dev: random key with warning)\n- [ ] AuditAttribution populated on every audit write when ResolvedIdentity is present\n- [ ] gRPC service.rs migrated from x-axon-database to composite x-axon-tenant-database\n- [ ] gRPC service.rs gained optional JWT verify path\n- [ ] cutover_jwt_test.rs integration test with real JWT end-to-end\n- [ ] scripts/cutover-smoke.sh script runs end-to-end against dev server\n- [ ] cargo test --workspace green\n- [ ] cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings clean\n- [ ] Legacy auth paths (--no-auth, --guest-role, Tailscale) still work unchanged","closing_commit_sha":"1a378fe785612ab9a24241977cf60c0c13e150b9","created_at":"2026-04-15T11:54:30.489788638Z","description":"Finish wiring the ADR-018 auth stack into the real request pipeline. After the smoke test on commit e83cf02, D3 already landed more than expected: `resolve_tenant_handler` composes `{tenant}:{database}` into the TenantRouter slug, giving real per-pair physical isolation. What remains is the three things that are *built but not installed*.\n\n## What is already live (confirmed by smoke test)\n\n- Path-based routing: /tenants/:t/databases/:d/... routed to per-pair SQLite files via composite slug\n- GraphQL under the nested path\n- Unprefixed REST + /graphql return 404\n- HttpAxonClient in the SDK + the UI use the new paths\n- Legacy X-Axon-Database header is gone from REST\n\n## What is still NOT installed (the gap this bead closes)\n\n### 1. JWT pipeline not enforced\n\nB1 landed `auth_pipeline::jwt_verify_layer` + `JwtIssuer`. The real gateway router in `crates/axon-server/src/gateway.rs` does NOT install this layer. The server currently runs in legacy auth mode (Tailscale or --no-auth). Install the layer as an OPTIONAL middleware: if the request has an Authorization header, run the JWT pipeline; if not, fall back to legacy auth.\n\nWire point: in `build_router_with_auth` (or wherever the data-plane nested router is constructed), add `.layer(from_fn_with_state(state.clone(), jwt_verify_layer))` before the tenant_handler middleware. The layer needs access to a `JwtIssuer` and the `StorageAdapter`. Add them to the AppState struct.\n\nCreate the JwtIssuer at server startup in `serve.rs`. Read the signing key from an env var `AXON_JWT_KEY` (base64 HMAC secret); if unset, generate a random 32-byte key at startup and log a warning (dev mode). Production key management is a future concern.\n\nThe legacy auth path (crates/axon-server/src/auth.rs Identity + Role) still works for requests without an Authorization header — the JWT layer is a no-op pass-through when the header is absent. This preserves --no-auth, --guest-role, and Tailscale whois behavior exactly as today.\n\n### 2. Audit attribution not populated\n\nF1 added `AuditAttribution` as an optional field on `AuditEntry` plus the `with_attribution()` builder. No handler currently calls it. In the JWT middleware (step 1), after `ResolvedIdentity` is installed into the request extension, also expose a `current_attribution()` helper on AppState that the audit write sites can call.\n\nFind every `AuditEntry::new(...)` call site in `crates/axon-server/src/gateway.rs` (there are probably 10-20) and chain `.with_attribution(current_attribution(\u0026request))` when a ResolvedIdentity is present. When absent (legacy auth), leave the attribution as None — the existing `actor: String` field still works.\n\n### 3. gRPC service.rs still reads x-axon-database\n\n`crates/axon-server/src/service.rs:26` has `const AXON_DATABASE_HEADER: \u0026str = \"x-axon-database\"` and `grpc_current_database` reads it from metadata. The gRPC service is entirely separate from the REST gateway and D3 did not touch it. Replace this header read with path-based extraction... except gRPC doesn't have URL paths in the same way. gRPC calls use service + method names, not paths. The database has to come from either:\n\n(a) A metadata field (still a header-equivalent), OR\n(b) A new field on every request proto\n\n(a) is pragmatic. Rename the metadata header from `x-axon-database` to `x-axon-tenant-database` and carry a composite value `\"{tenant}:{database}\"`. This matches the REST composite slug. The gRPC service parses it and dispatches via the same `get_or_create_any` path.\n\nAlso add `x-axon-authorization` (or reuse the standard `authorization` metadata key) for JWT credentials. Run the JWT verify pipeline in the gRPC `check_auth` step before dispatching to the handler.\n\nFor this bead, the gRPC change is small:\n- Rename the metadata constant\n- Update `grpc_current_database` to parse the composite form\n- Update the Rust + TS gRPC clients to send the composite form\n- Add JWT auth path in `check_auth`\n\n### 4. DatabaseRouter NOT swapped in (deferred — not needed right now)\n\nD2 landed `DatabaseRouter` as a new primitive, but the gateway still uses `TenantRouter::get_or_create_any(slug)`. The smoke test confirmed this composite slug works correctly. Replacing TenantRouter with DatabaseRouter is a refactor that doesn't change behavior — defer it to a later cleanup bead. Not in this bead's scope.\n\n## Scope summary\n\nThis bead does exactly three things:\n\n1. Install B1's JWT middleware in the data-plane router, optional path (Authorization header present)\n2. Populate F1's AuditAttribution at every audit write site when ResolvedIdentity is present\n3. Migrate gRPC service.rs from x-axon-database header to the composite slug + optional JWT metadata\n\n## Tests for this bead\n\n### Integration test: crates/axon-server/tests/cutover_jwt_test.rs (NEW)\n\n- create a JwtIssuer with a known key\n- mint a JWT for a default user with grants on (default, default)\n- start the in-process test server harness that gateway_test.rs uses\n- send a request with Authorization: Bearer \u003cjwt\u003e to /tenants/default/databases/default/collections\n- assert 200 (the JWT pipeline accepted + the handler saw ResolvedIdentity)\n\n### Integration test: attribution populated\n\n- send an entity-create request with a JWT\n- query the audit log\n- assert the audit entry has `attribution.user_id` set to the JWT sub\n\n### gRPC test: composite slug\n\n- send a CreateEntity gRPC request with metadata `x-axon-tenant-database: acme:orders`\n- assert routing to the acme:orders database (check the storage file exists)\n\n### Manual smoke test\n\nStart the server, issue a JWT via `/control/tenants/default/credentials`, use the HttpAxonClient with the JWT, create an entity, verify the audit log has attribution. Write a short shell script under `scripts/cutover-smoke.sh` that does this end-to-end.\n\n## Out of scope\n\n- DatabaseRouter replacement — deferred\n- OIDC federation — follow-up\n- Signing key rotation — future ADR\n- Removing legacy Identity/Role types from auth.rs — they still serve the --no-auth and Tailscale paths\n\n## Files to touch\n\n- crates/axon-server/src/gateway.rs — install JWT middleware, thread AuditAttribution into audit writes (10-20 sites)\n- crates/axon-server/src/serve.rs — construct JwtIssuer at startup\n- crates/axon-server/src/service.rs — rename header constant, parse composite, add JWT path\n- crates/axon-server/tests/cutover_jwt_test.rs — NEW\n- scripts/cutover-smoke.sh — NEW\n- Possibly sdk/typescript/src/client.ts — update gRPC metadata key if touching gRPC SDK surface\n\n## Files NOT to touch\n\n- crates/axon-server/src/auth_pipeline.rs — B1 is canonical, just consume it\n- crates/axon-server/src/auth.rs — legacy Tailscale path, out of scope for removal\n- crates/axon-storage/* — no storage changes\n- crates/axon-core/* — no type changes\n\n## Verification\n\n- cargo test -p axon-server (all prior tests green + new cutover_jwt_test)\n- cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings clean\n- scripts/cutover-smoke.sh runs end-to-end against a dev ./cli/internal/agent/testdata/reviewer/reviewer-stream-oversized-body.jsonl:1:{"id":"as-bc4b0e90","timestamp":"2026-04-15T01:50:16.151938804Z","harness":"claude","surface":"claude","canonical_target":"claude-sonnet-4-6","model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","prompt_len":13868,"prompt":"\u003cexecute-bead\u003e\n  \u003cbead id=\"axon-dccbdf73\"\u003e\n    \u003ctitle\u003eauth-jwt-pipeline: sign + verify with revocation cache + request extension\u003c/title\u003e\n    \u003cdescription\u003e\nImplement the full JWT verification middleware in axon-server.\n\n## What you're building\n\nAn axum middleware layer that runs on every data-plane request. It validates the JWT, installs a (user_id, tenant_id, grants) tuple into the request extension, and returns a typed AuthError on any failure. Downstream handlers read the extension and trust it completely.\n\n## Scope — exactly what to add\n\n### New file: `crates/axon-server/src/auth_pipeline.rs`\n\nA module exposing two things:\n\n1. A `JwtIssuer` helper that signs a `JwtClaims` into a compact JWT string. HS256 is the only algorithm required for this bead. The signing key is a `Vec\u003cu8\u003e` passed in at construction. Provide `issue(\u0026self, claims: \u0026JwtClaims) -\u003e Result\u003cString, AuthError\u003e` and a `verify(\u0026self, token: \u0026str) -\u003e Result\u003cJwtClaims, AuthError\u003e` for round-tripping in tests.\n\n2. An axum middleware `async fn jwt_verify_layer` that runs the 8-step verification order below. On success, installs a `ResolvedIdentity { user_id, tenant_id, grants }` into the request extension. On failure, returns a response built via `AuthError::into_response()` so the mapping to HTTP status + error.code is consistent.\n\nThe middleware also owns an `InMemoryRevocationCache` (a small `tokio::sync::RwLock\u003cHashSet\u003cUuid\u003e\u003e` is fine; nothing fancy) and falls back to SQL (via the storage adapter's new `is_jti_revoked` method) on cache miss.\n\n### Extend: `crates/axon-core/src/auth.rs`\n\n- Add `ResolvedIdentity { pub user_id: UserId, pub tenant_id: TenantId, pub grants: Grants }`.\n- Add `impl AuthError` with `pub fn status_code(\u0026self) -\u003e u16` returning 401 or 403 per ADR-018 §4 failure table, and `pub fn error_code(\u0026self) -\u003e \u0026'static str` returning the stable code string. (An axum `IntoResponse` impl can live in axon-server.)\n- Add `impl Grants` with `pub fn find_database(\u0026self, name: \u0026str) -\u003e Option\u003c\u0026GrantedDatabase\u003e` and `impl GrantedDatabase` with `pub fn has_op(\u0026self, op: Op) -\u003e bool`.\n\n### Extend: `crates/axon-storage/src/adapter.rs` (trait)\n\nAdd one method to the `StorageAdapter` trait:\n\n```rust\nasync fn is_jti_revoked(\u0026self, jti: Uuid) -\u003e Result\u003cbool, AxonError\u003e;\n```\n\nImplement it in `crates/axon-storage/src/memory.rs` (store a `HashSet\u003cUuid\u003e`; default-empty), `crates/axon-storage/src/sqlite.rs`, and `crates/axon-storage/src/postgres.rs` (`SELECT 1 FROM credential_revocations WHERE jti = $1`). The A1 schema (`auth_schema.rs`) already has the `credential_revocations` table — just query it.\n\n### Wire into: `crates/axon-server/src/lib.rs`\n\nRe-export `auth_pipeline::{jwt_verify_layer, JwtIssuer, InMemoryRevocationCache}`. Don't wire it into the main router yet — that's D-phase work. For this bead, the middleware just needs to exist and be testable in isolation.\n\n## Verification order (normative — ADR-018 §4)\n\n1. Extract `Authorization: Bearer \u003cjwt\u003e` from the request. Missing header → `AuthError::Unauthenticated` (401). The `--no-auth` bypass is NOT part of this bead — that's E2.\n2. Parse and verify the JWT signature with HS256 against the issuer's key. Signature invalid → `CredentialInvalid` (401). Malformed structure → `CredentialMalformed` (401). `aud` as a JSON array → `CredentialMalformed` (this falls out of the A2 `parse_claims` wrapper — use it).\n3. Check `nbf` and `exp` against `SystemTime::now()` with a 30s skew budget. `exp` more than 30s in the past → `CredentialExpired` (401). `nbf` more than 30s in the future → `CredentialNotYetValid` (401).\n4. Check `claims.jti` against the revocation cache, then SQL on miss. Hit → `CredentialRevoked` (401). Populate the cache on SQL hit to speed up subsequent checks.\n5. Compare `claims.aud` to the `{tenant}` segment extracted from the URL path. Mismatch → `CredentialWrongTenant` (**403**, not 401 — see the table). The URL extraction path is: look at `request.uri().path()` and parse the leading `/tenants/{tenant}/databases/{database}/...` segments. For this bead, implement a small helper `fn extract_tenant_database(path: \u0026str) -\u003e Option\u003c(\u0026str, \u0026str)\u003e` that returns `None` for non-data-plane paths so they skip the middleware.\n6. Look up the `sub` UUID in the `users` table via a new `StorageAdapter::get_user(UserId) -\u003e Result\u003cOption\u003cUser\u003e, AxonError\u003e` method. User not found or `user.suspended_at_ms.is_some()` → `UserSuspended` (401).\n7. Check tenant membership: a new `StorageAdapter::get_tenant_member(TenantId, UserId) -\u003e Result\u003cOption\u003cTenantMember\u003e, AxonError\u003e`. Missing → `NotATenantMember` (403).\n8. Walk `claims.grants.databases[]` looking for an entry matching the URL `{database}`. None → `DatabaseNotGranted` (403). Found → compute the required op from the HTTP method (GET = Read, POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE = Write) and intersect with the grant's ops. Empty intersection → `OpNotGranted` (403). Admin-requiring routes are out of scope for this bead — the middleware only handles Read/Write classification.\n9. Build `ResolvedIdentity` and install it via `request.extensions_mut().insert(resolved)`.\n\n## Error mapping — must exactly match ADR-018 §4\n\nThe mapping table is copied here verbatim. Do not invent variants; the 14 AuthError variants already exist in axon-core.\n\n| Failure | Status | `error.code` |\n|---|---|---|\n| No Authorization header | 401 | `unauthenticated` |\n| Header not `Bearer \u003ctoken\u003e` or base64 broken | 401 | `credential_malformed` |\n| JWT structurally invalid / missing claims | 401 | `credential_malformed` |\n| `aud` as JSON array | 401 | `credential_malformed` |\n| Signature invalid | 401 | `credential_invalid` |\n| `exp` in past (beyond skew) | 401 | `credential_expired` |\n| `nbf` in future (beyond skew) | 401 | `credential_not_yet_valid` |\n| `jti` revoked | 401 | `credential_revoked` |\n| `iss` unknown | 401 | `credential_foreign_issuer` — for this bead, reject if `claims.iss != issuer.issuer_id` |\n| `aud` ≠ URL tenant | **403** | `credential_wrong_tenant` |\n| `sub` suspended/deleted | 401 | `user_suspended` |\n| `sub` not a tenant member | **403** | `not_a_tenant_member` |\n| URL database not in grants | **403** | `database_not_granted` |\n| Op not in grant | **403** | `op_not_granted` |\n\nNote the 401 vs 403 split: credential-level problems are 401, scope-level problems are 403.\n\n## Testing — all must pass for this bead to be complete\n\n### Unit tests in `crates/axon-server/tests/auth_pipeline_test.rs`\n\nFor every row of the error mapping table, build the minimal defective request and assert the middleware produces exactly that `(status, error_code)` pair. Table-driven with `#[test]` or a single `#[test]` that iterates an array of cases.\n\nAdditionally:\n\n- `jwt_roundtrip_succeeds`: issue a valid JWT with `JwtIssuer::issue`, verify it with `JwtIssuer::verify`, assert claims match.\n- `valid_jwt_populates_request_extension`: run the full middleware on a valid JWT, assert the response is 200 and the handler sees `ResolvedIdentity` in extensions.\n- `revocation_takes_effect_within_one_second`: issue a valid JWT, verify it succeeds, insert the jti into the revocation cache, verify the next request returns 401 `credential_revoked`. Do NOT use sleep — invalidate the cache directly.\n- `clock_skew_30s_accepted_31s_rejected`: construct a JWT with `exp` at `now - 29s` (should succeed) and one with `exp` at `now - 31s` (should fail with `credential_expired`). Do the same for `nbf`.\n- `ops_matrix`: for each HTTP method in {GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE} and each op set in the grant, assert the expected 200/403 outcome.\n\n### Integration test in `crates/axon-server/tests/auth_pipeline_integration_test.rs`\n\nBuild a minimal axum router with one dummy route `GET /tenants/acme/databases/orders/ping`. Install the middleware. Hit it with:\n- No auth header → 401 `unauthenticated`\n- Valid JWT with `grants: [{name: \"orders\", ops: [read]}]` → 200\n- Valid JWT with the wrong tenant in aud → 403 `credential_wrong_tenant`\n- Valid JWT with grants for a different database → 403 `database_not_granted`\n\n### axon-sim workload `inv_018_grant_enforcement`\n\n**If this is too large for one pass, skip the axon-sim workload and note it in the commit message for a follow-up bead.** The core verification must ship; the simulation workload can follow. USE IT.\n- `AUTH_ERROR_VARIANT_COUNT == 14` is enforced via compile-time exhaustive match.\n- Delegation helper on `TenantRole`: `admin.can_delegate(op)` / etc.\n\n### Files you should NOT touch\n- Anything outside `crates/axon-server/src/auth_pipeline.rs`, `crates/axon-core/src/auth.rs` (additive), `crates/axon-storage/src/{adapter,memory,sqlite,postgres}.rs` (additive), and the two new test files.\n- The existing `crates/axon-server/src/auth.rs` — that's the Tailscale whois path. SQLite connection.\\n15\\t///\\n16\\t/// This is idempotent — running it multiple times on the same database\\n17\\t/// produces the same result without errors or duplicate rows.\\n18\\tpub fn apply_auth_migrations_sqlite(conn: \u0026rusqlite::Connection) -\u003e Result\u003c(), String\u003e {\\n19\\t    // Create tenants table.\\n20\\t    // UNIQUE(name) enforced by the UNIQUE constraint on the name column.\\n21\\t    conn.execute_batch(\\n22\\t        \\\"CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tenants (\\n23\\t            id                 TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\\n24\\t            name               TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,\\n25\\t            display_name       TEXT NOT NULL,\\n26\\t            created_at_ms      INTEGER NOT NULL,\\n27\\t            updated_at_ms      INTEGER NOT NULL\\n28\\t        )\\\",\\n29\\t    )\\n30\\t    .map_err(|e| format!(\\\"tenants table: {e}\\\"))?;\\n31\\t\\n32\\t    // Create users table.\\n33\\t    conn.execute_batch(\\n34\\t        \\\"CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\\n35\\t            id                 TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\\n36\\t            display_name       TEXT NOT NULL,\\n37\\t            email              TEXT,\\n38\\t            created_at_ms      INTEGER NOT NULL,\\n39\\t            suspended_at_ms    INTEGER\\n40\\t        )\\\",\\n41\\t    )\\n42\\t    .map_err(|e| format!(\\\"users table: {e}\\\"))?;\\n43\\t\\n44\\t    // Create user_identities table.\\n45\\t    // PRIMARY KEY (provider, external_id) enforces UNIQUE(provider, external_id).\\n46\\t    conn.execute_batch(\\n47\\t        \\\"CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_identities (\\n48\\t            provider       TEXT NOT NULL,\\n49\\t            external_id    TEXT NOT NULL,\\n50\\t            user_id        TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),\\n51\\t            created_at_ms  INTEGER NOT NULL,\\n52\\t            PRIMARY KEY (provider, external_id)\\n53\\t        )\\\",\\n54\\t    )\\n55\\t    .map_err(|e| format!(\\\"user_identities table: {e}\\\"))?;\\n56\\t\\n57\\t    // Create tenant_users table.\\n58\\t    // PRIMARY KEY (tenant_id, user_id) is the composite PK required by ADR-018.\\n59\\t    conn.execute_batch(\\n60\\t        \\\"CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tenant_users (\\n61\\t            tenant_id    TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES tenants(id),\\n62\\t            user_id      TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),\\n63\\t            role         TEXT NOT NULL,\\n64\\t            added_at_ms  INTEGER NOT NULL,\\n65\\t            PRIMARY KEY (tenant_id, user_id)\\n66\\t        )\\\",\\n67\\t    )\\n68\\t    .map_err(|e| format!(\\\"tenant_users table: {e}\\\"))?;\\n69\\t\\n70\\t    // Create tenant_databases table.\\n71\\t    conn.execute_batch(\\n72\\t        \\\"CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tenant_databases (\\n73\\t            tenant_id      TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES tenants(id),\\n74\\t            database_name  TEXT NOT NULL,\\n75\\t            created_at_ms  INTEGER NOT NULL,\\n76\\t            PRIMARY KEY Axon server — HTTP gateway, gRPC service, MCP stdio, and authentication.\\n2\\t//!\\n3\\t//! # Authentication\\n4\\t//!\\n5\\t//! Identity is resolved once per request by [`auth::AuthContext`] and\\n6\\t//! injected as a typed extension.  Three modes are supported:\\n7\\t//!\\n8\\t//! | Mode | Flag | Actor | Role |\\n9\\t//! |------|------|-------|------|\\n10\\t//! | `NoAuth` | `--no-auth` | `\\\"anonymous\\\"` | Admin |\\n11\\t//! | `Tailscale` | *(default)* | node name | from ACL tags |\\n12\\t//! | `Guest` | `--guest-role \u003crole\u003e` | `\\\"guest\\\"` | configured role |\\n13\\t//!\\n14\\t//! In `Tailscale` mode the server contacts the local Tailscale daemon over its\\n15\\t//! Unix socket (`/run/tailscale/tailscaled.sock` by default) and calls\\n16\\t//! `/localapi/v0/whois?addr=\u003cpeer\u003e` to resolve the connecting node's identity.\\n17\\t//! Resolved identities are cached by peer IP for the duration of\\n18\\t//! `--auth-cache-ttl-secs` (default 60 s).\\n19\\t//!\\n20\\t//! ACL tag → role mapping:\\n21\\t//! - `tag:axon-admin` → [`Role::Admin`]\\n22\\t//! - `tag:axon-write` / `tag:axon-agent` → [`Role::Write`]\\n23\\t//! - `tag:axon-read` → [`Role::Read`]\\n24\\t//! - no matching tag → `--tailscale-default-role` (default `read`)\\n25\\t//!\\n26\\t//! Connections that are not on the tailnet are rejected with HTTP 401 / gRPC\\n27\\t//! `UNAUTHENTICATED`.  If the Tailscale daemon is unreachable the server\\n28\\t//! returns HTTP 503 / gRPC `UNAVAILABLE`.\\n29\\t//!\\n30\\t//! # Request flow\\n31\\t//!\\n32\\t//! ```text\\n33\\t//! TCP accept\\n34\\t//!   └─ authenticate_http_request  (gateway.rs middleware)\\n35\\t//!        ├─ AuthContext::resolve_peer  →  Identity\\n36\\t//!        └─ insert Identity into request extensions\\n37\\t//!             └─ route handler\\n38\\t//!                  ├─ extract Extension\u003cIdentity\u003e\\n39\\t//!                  ├─ identity.require_read() / require_write() / require_admin()\\n40\\t//!                  └─ handler logic\\n41\\t//! ```\\n42\\t//!\\n43\\t//! gRPC follows the same pattern via [`service::AxonServiceImpl::authorize`].\\n44\\tpub mod data.text: The repo is a Go CLI/server with a Svelte frontend and generated gqlgen schema. I also see unrelated dirty skill symlinks in this worktree; I’ll leave those alone and stage only files for this bead.

data.output:
---
name: frontend-design
description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, artifacts, posters, or applications (examples include websites, landing pages, dashboards, React components, HTML/CSS layouts, or when styling/beautifying any web UI). Generates creative, polished code and UI design that avoids generic AI aesthetics.
license: Complete terms in LICENSE.txt
---

This skill guides creation of distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces that avoid generic "AI slop" aesthetics. Implement real working code with exceptional attention to aesthetic details and creative choices.

The user provides frontend requirements: a component, page, application, or interface to build. They may include context about the purpose, audience, or technical constraints.

## Design Thinking

Before coding, understand the context and commit to a BOLD aesthetic direction:
- **Purpose**: What problem does this interface solve? Who uses it?
- **Tone**: Pick an extreme: brutally minimal, maximalist chaos, retro-futuristic, organic/natural, luxury/refined, playful/toy-like, editorial/magazine, brutalist/raw, art deco/geometric, soft/pastel, industrial/utilitarian, etc. There are so many flavors to choose from. Use these for inspiration but design one that is true to the aesthetic direction.
- **Constraints**: Technical requirements (framework, performance, accessibility).
- **Differentiation**: What makes this UNFORGETTABLE? What's the one thing someone will remember?

**CRITICAL**: Choose a clear conceptual direction and execute it with precision. Bold maximalism and refined minimalism both work - the key is intentionality, not intensity.

Then implement working code (HTML/CSS/JS, React, Vue, etc.) that is:
- Production-grade and functional
- Visually striking and memorable
- Cohesive with a clear aesthetic point-of-view
- Meticulously refined in every detail

## Frontend Aesthetics Guidelines

Focus on:
- **Typography**: Choose fonts that are beautiful, unique, and interesting. Avoid generic fonts like Arial and Inter; opt instead for distinctive choices that elevate the frontend's aesthetics; unexpected, characterful font choices. Pair a distinctive display font with a refined body font.
- **Color & Theme**: Commit to a cohesive aesthetic. Use CSS variables for consistency. Dominant colors with sharp accents outperform timid, evenly-distributed palettes.
- **Motion**: Use animations for effects and micro-interactions. Prioritize CSS-only solutions for HTML. Use Motion library for React when available. Focus on high-impact moments: one well-orchestrated page load with staggered reveals (animation-delay) creates more delight than scattered micro-interactions. Use scroll-triggering and hover states that surprise.
- **Spatial Composition**: Unexpected layouts. Asymmetry. Overlap. Diagonal flow. Grid-breaking elements. Generous negative space OR controlled density.
- **Backgrounds & Visual Details**: Create atmosphere and depth rather than defaulting to solid colors. Add contextual effects and textures that match the overall aesthetic. Apply creative forms like gradient meshes, noise textures, geometric patterns, layered transparencies, dramatic shadows, decorative borders, custom cursors, and grain overlays.

NEVER use generic AI-generated aesthetics like overused font families (Inter, Roboto, Arial, system fonts), cliched color schemes (particularly purple gradients on white backgrounds), predictable layouts and component patterns, and cookie-cutter design that lacks context-specific character.

Interpret creatively and make unexpected choices that feel genuinely designed for the context. No design should be the same. Vary between light and dark themes, different fonts, different aesthetics. NEVER converge on common choices (Space Grotesk, for example) across generations.

**IMPORTANT**: Match implementation complexity to the aesthetic vision. Maximalist designs need elaborate code with extensive animations and effects. Minimalist or refined designs need restraint, precision, and careful attention to spacing, typography, and subtle details. Elegance comes from executing the vision well.

Remember: Claude is capable of extraordinary creative work. Don't hold back, show what can truly be created when thinking outside the box and committing fully to a distinctive vision.

data.text: Using the `frontend-design` skill for the Svelte route work, but I’ll keep the visual treatment consistent with the existing DDx app rather than introducing a separate aesthetic. Next I’m locating the schema, resolvers, server state commands, and route conventions.

# DDx GraphQL Schema
# Single source of truth for the SvelteKit UI.
# Every type field is doc-commented. Relay cursor connections on all lists.

# ============================================
# Scalars
# ============================================

"""ISO-8601 datetime string"""
scalar DateTime

"""Arbitrary JSON blob (used for opaque map fields)"""
scalar JSON

# ============================================
# Interfaces
# ============================================

"""Node is the Relay global object identification interface"""
interface Node {
  """Globally unique identifier"""
  id: ID!
}

# ============================================
# Pagination (Relay Cursor Connections)
# ============================================

"""PageInfo carries cursor-based pagination state (Relay spec)"""
type PageInfo {
  """True when more edges exist after the last returned edge"""
  hasNextPage: Boolean!
  """True when more edges exist before the first returned edge"""
  hasPreviousPage: Boolean!
  """Cursor of the first edge in the current page (null when empty)"""
  startCursor: String
  """Cursor of the last edge in the current page (null when empty)"""
  endCursor: String
}

# ============================================
# Node & Project
# ============================================

"""NodeInfo represents the running ddx-server instance"""
type NodeInfo implements Node {
  """Unique node identifier (stable across restarts)"""
  id: ID!
  """Human-readable node name"""
  name: String!
  """Timestamp when the server process started"""
  startedAt: DateTime!
  """Timestamp of the most recent heartbeat"""
  lastSeen: DateTime!
}

"""Project represents a registered ddx project on this node"""
type Project implements Node {
  """Unique project identifier"""
  id: ID!
  """Short display name"""
  name: String!
  """Absolute filesystem path to the project root"""
  path: String!
  """Git remote URL, if configured"""
  gitRemote: String
  """When the project was first registered with the server"""
  registeredAt: DateTime!
  """Timestamp of the last successful probe"""
  lastSeen: DateTime!
  """True when the project path is inaccessible"""
  unreachable: Boolean
  """Set when the project has been tombstoned (soft-deleted)"""
  tombstonedAt: DateTime
}

"""ProjectEdge is one edge in a ProjectConnection"""
type ProjectEdge {
  """The project at this position"""
  node: Project!
  """Opaque cursor for pagination"""
  cursor: String!
}

"""ProjectConnection is a Relay cursor connection of projects"""
type ProjectConnection {
  """Ordered list of project edges"""
  edges: [ProjectEdge!]!
  """Pagination metadata"""
  pageInfo: PageInfo!
  """Total number of projects matching the filter"""
  totalCount: Int!
}

# ============================================
# Beads
# ============================================

"""Bead is a portable work item with lifecycle metadata"""
type Bead implements Node {
  """Unique bead identifier (e.g. "ddx-a1b2c3d4")"""
  id: ID!
  """Short summary of the work"""
  title: String!
  """Lifecycle status: open, in-progress, closed, blocked"""
  status: String!
  """Numeric priority (lower is higher priority)"""
  priority: Int!
  """Issue classification (e.g. "task", "bug", "spike")"""
  issueType: String!
  """Agent or human currently responsible"""
  owner: String
  """When the bead was created"""
  createdAt: DateTime!
  """Who or what created the bead"""
  createdBy: String
  """Last modification timestamp"""
  updatedAt: DateTime!
  """Freeform labels for filtering and grouping"""
  labels: [String!]
  """Project identifier this bead belongs to"""
  projectID: String
  """Parent bead ID for hierarchy"""
  parent: String
  """Full description / body text"""
  description: String
  """Acceptance criteria text"""
  acceptance: String
  """Freeform notes appended during work"""
  notes: String
  """Dependency edges to other beads"""
  dependencies: [Dependency!]
}

"""Dependency is a directed edge between two beads"""
type Dependency {
  """The bead that has the dependency"""
  issueId: String!
  """The bead that must be completed first"""
  dependsOnId: String!
  """Dependency kind (e.g. "blocks", "relates-to")"""
  type: String!
  """When the dependency was created"""
  createdAt: String
  """Who created the dependency"""
  createdBy: String
  """Opaque metadata attached to the link"""
  metadata: String
}

"""BeadEdge is one edge in a BeadConnection"""
type BeadEdge {
  """The bead at this position"""
  node: Bead!
  """Opaque cursor for pagination"""
  cursor: String!
}

"""BeadConnection is a Relay cursor connection of beads"""
type BeadConnection {
  """Ordered list of bead edges"""
  edges: [BeadEdge!]!
  """Pagination metadata"""
  pageInfo: PageInfo!
  """Total number of beads matching the filter"""
  totalCount: Int!
}

"""BeadStatusCounts holds aggregate bead counts by status"""
type BeadStatusCounts {
  """Number of beads in open status"""
  open: Int!
  """Number of beads in closed status"""
  closed: Int!
  """Number of beads with unclosed dependencies"""
  blocked: Int!
  """Number of open beads whose dependencies are all closed"""
  ready: Int!
  """Total number of beads"""
  total: Int!
}

# ============================================
# Documents (library)
# ============================================

"""Document represents a docgraph document with dependency tracking"""
type Document implements Node {
  """Document identifier (usually the relative path)"""
  id: ID!
  """Filesystem path relative to the library root"""
  path: String!
  """Human-readable title extracted from frontmatter"""
  title: String!
  """IDs of documents this document depends on"""
  dependsOn: [String!]!
  """IDs of input artifacts consumed by this document"""
  inputs: [String!]!
  """IDs of documents that depend on this document"""
  dependents: [String!]!
  """Review state metadata (null if never reviewed)"""
  review: DocumentReview
  """True if parked (excluded from staleness checks)"""
  parkingLot: Boolean!
  """Prompt text embedded in the document frontmatter"""
  prompt: String
  """Execution definition embedded in the document (null if none)"""
  execDef: DocumentExecDef
  """Raw file content (populated only by documentByPath, null in list queries)"""
  content: String
}

"""DocumentReview holds review-state metadata for a document"""
type DocumentReview {
  """Hash of the document content at review time"""
  selfHash: String!
  """Map of dependency IDs to their hashes at review time"""
  deps: JSON!
  """ISO-8601 timestamp of the last review"""
  reviewedAt: String!
}

"""DocumentExecDef holds an execution definition embedded in a document"""
type DocumentExecDef {
  """Definition identifier"""
  id: String
  """IDs of artifacts this definition produces or consumes"""
  artifactIds: [String!]
  """How to invoke the execution"""
  executor: ExecutorSpec
  """How to interpret the result"""
  result: ResultSpec
  """Evaluation criteria and thresholds"""
  evaluation: Evaluation
  """Whether the definition is currently active"""
  active: Boolean
  """Whether the definition must pass for merge"""
  required: Boolean
  """Whether this definition was discovered from the docgraph"""
  graphSource: Boolean
  """When the definition was created"""
  createdAt: DateTime
}

"""ExecutorSpec describes how to invoke an execution"""
type ExecutorSpec {
  """Execution kind (e.g. "shell", "agent")"""
  kind: String!
  """Command and arguments to run"""
  command: [String!]
  """Working directory for the command"""
  cwd: String
  """Environment variables as key-value pairs"""
  env: JSON
  """Maximum execution time in milliseconds"""
  timeoutMs: Int
}

"""ResultSpec describes how to interpret an execution result"""
type ResultSpec {

"""Metric-shaped projection (null if not metric-typed)"""
  metric: MetricResultSpec
}

"""MetricResultSpec defines metric extraction from execution output"""
type MetricResultSpec {
  """Unit of measurement (e.g. "ms", "bytes")"""
  unit: String
  """JSONPath to the numeric value"""
  valuePath: String
  """JSONPath to the samples array"""
  samplesPath: String
}

"""Evaluation holds interpretation rules for execution results"""
type Evaluation {
  """Comparison operator (e.g. "lt", "gt", "eq")"""
  comparison: String
  """Threshold values for warn/ratchet"""
  thresholds: Thresholds
}

"""Thresholds captures the ratchet policy for metric evaluations"""
type Thresholds {
  """Warn threshold in milliseconds"""
  warnMs: Float
  """Ratchet threshold in milliseconds"""
  ratchetMs: Float
}

"""DocumentEdge is one edge in a DocumentConnection"""
type DocumentEdge {
  """The document at this position"""
  node: Document!
  """Opaque cursor for pagination"""
  cursor: String!
}

"""DocumentConnection is a Relay cursor connection of documents"""
type DocumentConnection {
  """Ordered list of document edges"""
  edges: [DocumentEdge!]!
  """Pagination metadata"""
  pageInfo: PageInfo!
  """Total number of documents matching the filter"""
  totalCount: Int!
}

# ============================================
# Doc Graph
# ============================================

"""DocGraph represents the full document dependency graph"""
type DocGraph {
  """Absolute path to the docgraph root directory"""
  rootDir: String!
  """All documents in the graph"""
  documents: [Document!]!
  """Map of relative paths to document IDs"""
  pathToId: JSON!
  """Map of document IDs to lists of dependent IDs"""
  dependents: JSON!
  """Warnings generated during graph construction. Derived from issues; prefer the structured issues field when rendering UI."""
  warnings: [String!]!
  """Structured integrity issues for the graph, grouped by kind on the client."""
  issues: [GraphIssue!]!
}

"""GraphIssue describes one integrity problem discovered while building the document graph."""
type GraphIssue {
  """Machine-readable category (e.g. duplicate_id, missing_dep)."""
  kind: String!
  """Path of the offending document, when known."""
  path: String
  """Document identifier associated with the issue, when known."""
  id: String
  """Human-readable explanation suitable for the UI or terminal."""
  message: String!
  """Related document path (e.g. the pre-existing path a duplicate ID collides with)."""
  relatedPath: String
}

"""StaleReason explains why a specific document is stale"""
type StaleReason {
  """Document identifier"""
  id: ID!
  """Filesystem path of the stale document"""
  path: String!
  """Human-readable explanations of why the document is stale"""
  reasons: [String!]!
}

"""SearchResult represents a single search hit from the library"""
type SearchResult {

}

  """The search result at this position"""

}

"""SearchResultConnection is a Relay cursor connection of search results"""
type SearchResultConnection {
  """Ordered list of search result edges"""
  edges: [SearchResultEdge!]!
  """Pagination metadata"""
  pageInfo: PageInfo!
  """Total number of results matching the query"""
  totalCount: Int!
}

"""Commit represents a git commit"""

  """Commit timestamp"""

}

# ============================================
# Workers
# ============================================

"""Worker represents an execute-loop worker process"""
type Worker implements Node {
  """Unique worker identifier"""
  id: ID!
  """Worker kind (e.g. "execute-loop")"""
  kind: String!
  """Current lifecycle state (e.g. "running", "idle", "stopped")"""
  state: String!
  """Human-readable status summary"""
  status: String
  """Absolute path to the project this worker operates on"""
  projectRoot: String!
  """Agent harness name (e.g. "claude", "codex")"""
  harness: String
  """Provider/backend name"""
  provider: String
  """Model identifier used for execution"""
  model: String
  """Effort level (e.g. "low", "medium", "high")"""
  effort: String
  """True if the worker should stop after one bead"""
  once: Boolean
  """Interval between poll cycles (e.g. "30s")"""
  pollInterval: String
  """When the worker was started"""
  startedAt: DateTime
  """When the worker finished (null if still running)"""
  finishedAt: DateTime
  """Fatal error that stopped the worker"""
  error: String
  """Path to the worker's stdout log file"""
  stdoutPath: String
  """Path to the worker's spec/config file"""
  specPath: String
  """Total number of execution attempts"""
  attempts: Int
  """Number of successful executions"""
  successes: Int
  """Number of failed executions"""
  failures: Int
  """Bead ID currently being executed (null if idle)"""
  currentBead: String
  """Most recent error message from an execution"""
  lastError: String
  """Result of the most recently completed execution"""
  lastResult: WorkerExecutionResult
  """In-flight attempt summary (null if idle)"""
  currentAttempt: CurrentAttemptInfo
  """Recent phase transitions for observability"""
  recentPhases: [PhaseTransition!]
  """Summary of the most recently completed attempt"""
  lastAttempt: LastAttemptInfo
  """Land coordinator metrics for this worker's project"""
  landSummary: CoordinatorMetrics
  """Recent streamed response events captured for the worker detail view"""
  recentEvents: [WorkerRecentEvent!]!
  """Operator lifecycle actions recorded for this worker"""
  lifecycleEvents: [WorkerLifecycleEvent!]!
}

"""WorkerLifecycleEvent records an operator lifecycle action."""
type WorkerLifecycleEvent {
  """Action name, such as start or stop"""
  action: String!
  """Actor identifier known to the server"""
  actor: String!
  """When the action was recorded"""
  timestamp: DateTime!
  """Optional action detail"""
  detail: String
  """Bead involved in the action, if any"""
  beadId: String
}

"""WorkerRecentEvent is one captured response frame in worker detail history"""
type WorkerRecentEvent {
  """Event kind: text_delta or tool_call"""
  kind: String!
  """Text content for text_delta events"""
  text: String
  """Tool name for tool_call events"""
  name: String
  """Tool call input payload encoded as JSON text"""
  inputs: String
  """Tool call output text"""
  output: String
}

"""CurrentAttemptInfo summarises the in-flight execution attempt"""
type CurrentAttemptInfo {
  """Unique attempt identifier"""
  attemptId: String!
  """Bead being executed"""
  beadId: String!
  """Title of the bead being executed"""
  beadTitle: String
  """Harness running this attempt"""
  harness: String
  """Model used for this attempt"""
  model: String
  """Profile/configuration name"""
  profile: String
  """Current execution phase"""
  phase: String!
  """Sequence number of the current phase"""
  phaseSeq: Int!
  """When this attempt started"""
  startedAt: DateTime!
  """Milliseconds elapsed since attempt start"""
  elapsedMs: Int!
}

"""PhaseTransition records a single phase change event"""
type PhaseTransition {
  """Phase name entered"""
  phase: String!
  """Timestamp of the transition"""
  ts: DateTime!
  """Sequence number of this phase"""
  phaseSeq: Int!
}

"""LastAttemptInfo summarises the most recently completed attempt"""
type LastAttemptInfo {
  """Unique attempt identifier"""
  attemptId: String!
  """Bead that was executed"""
  beadId: String!
  """Final phase reached"""
  phase: String!
  """When the attempt started"""
  startedAt: DateTime!
  """When the attempt ended"""
  endedAt: DateTime!
  """Total duration in milliseconds"""
  elapsedMs: Int!
}

"""WorkerExecutionResult captures the outcome of one execution"""
type WorkerExecutionResult {
  """Bead that was executed"""
  beadId: String
  """Unique attempt identifier"""
  attemptId: String
  """Worker that ran the execution"""
  workerId: String
  """Harness used"""
  harness: String
  """Provider used"""
  provider: String
  """Model used"""
  model: String
  """Outcome status (e.g. "success", "failure", "timeout")"""
  status: String
  """Human-readable outcome detail"""
  detail: String
  """Correlated agent session ID"""
  sessionId: String
  """Git revision the execution started from"""
  baseRev: String
  """Git revision produced by the execution"""
  resultRev: String
  """Suggested retry delay (e.g. "30s")"""
  retryAfter: String
}

"""WorkerEdge is one edge in a WorkerConnection"""
type WorkerEdge {
  """The worker at this position"""
  node: Worker!
  """Opaque cursor for pagination"""
  cursor: String!
}

"""WorkerConnection is a Relay cursor connection of workers"""
type WorkerConnection {
  """Ordered list of worker edges"""
  edges: [WorkerEdge!]!
  """Pagination metadata"""
  pageInfo: PageInfo!
  """Total number of workers matching the filter"""
  totalCount: Int!
}

"""WorkerLog holds captured output from a worker process"""
type WorkerLog {
  """Captured standard output"""
  stdout: String!
  """Captured standard error"""
  stderr: String!

stderr: String!
}

# ============================================
# Agent Sessions
# ============================================

"""AgentSession represents one agent execution session"""
type AgentSession implements Node {
  """Unique session identifier"""
  id: ID!
  """Project this session belongs to"""
  projectId: String!
  """Bead being worked on (null for ad-hoc runs)"""
  beadId: String
  """Worker that produced this session, when known"""
  workerId: String
  """Agent harness used (e.g. "claude", "codex")"""
  harness: String!
  """Model identifier"""
  model: String!
  """Effort level applied"""
  effort: String!
  """Session status (e.g. "running", "completed", "failed")"""
  status: String!
  """When the session started"""
  startedAt: DateTime!
  """When the session ended (null if still running)"""
  endedAt: DateTime
  """Path to stdout log file"""
  stdoutPath: String
  """Path to stderr log file"""
  stderrPath: String
  """Total duration in milliseconds"""
  durationMs: Int!
  """Estimated cost in USD (null if unknown)"""
  cost: Float
  """Cost-basis bucket for this session: paid, subscription, or local"""
  billingMode: String!
  """Token consumption breakdown"""
  tokens: TokenUsage
  """Outcome classification (e.g. "success", "failure")"""
  outcome: String
  """Human-readable outcome detail"""
  detail: String
  """Git revision produced by this session"""
  resultRev: String
  """Git revision the session started from"""
  baseRev: String
  """Prompt body, loaded only for agentSession(id:)"""
  prompt: String
  """Response body, loaded only for agentSession(id:)"""
  response: String
  """Standard error body, loaded only for agentSession(id:)"""
  stderr: String
}

"""TokenUsage breaks down token consumption for a session"""
type TokenUsage {
  """Number of prompt/input tokens consumed"""
  prompt: Int
  """Number of completion/output tokens generated"""
  completion: Int
  """Total tokens (prompt + completion)"""
  total: Int
  """Number of tokens served from cache"""
  cached: Int
}

"""AgentSessionEdge is one edge in an AgentSessionConnection"""
type AgentSessionEdge {
  """The session at this position"""
  node: AgentSession!
  """Opaque cursor for pagination"""
  cursor: String!
}

"""AgentSessionConnection is a Relay cursor connection of agent sessions"""
type AgentSessionConnection {
  """Ordered list of session edges"""
  edges: [AgentSessionEdge!]!
  """Pagination metadata"""
  pageInfo: PageInfo!
  """Total number of sessions matching the filter"""
  totalCount: Int!
}

"""SessionsCostSummary separates cash, subscription-equivalent, and local session costs"""
type SessionsCostSummary {
  """Actual billed pay-per-token API spend"""
  cashUsd: Float!
  """Dollar-equivalent token value consumed under subscription harnesses"""
  subscriptionEquivUsd: Float!
  """Count of sessions served locally"""
  localSessionCount: Int!
  """Optional local compute estimate, present only when configured"""
  localEstimatedUsd: Float
}

# ============================================
# Coordinators
# ============================================

"""LandOutcomeSummary is one entry in the coordinator's submission log"""
type LandOutcomeSummary {
  """When the submission completed"""
  ts: DateTime!
  """Bead ID that was submitted (null for non-bead work)"""
  beadId: String
  """Attempt ID of the submission"""
  attemptId: String
  """Outcome: landed, preserved, failed, or push_failed"""
  outcome: String!
  """Duration of the land operation in milliseconds"""
  durationMs: Int!
  """Number of commits in the submission"""
  commitCount: Int!
}

"""CoordinatorMetrics holds outcome metrics for one land coordinator"""
type CoordinatorMetrics {
  """Number of submissions successfully merged"""
  landed: Int!
  """Number of submissions kept in a separate worktree"""
  preserved: Int!
  """Number of submissions that failed"""
  failed: Int!
  """Number of submissions that failed to push"""
  pushFailed: Int!
  """Sum of all submission durations in milliseconds"""
  totalDurationMs: Int!
  """Total commits across all submissions"""
  totalCommits: Int!
  """Ratio of preserved+failed to total submissions"""
  preservedRatio: Float!
  """Up to the last 10 submission outcomes"""
  lastSubmissions: [LandOutcomeSummary!]
}

"""CoordinatorMetricsEntry pairs a project root with its coordinator metrics"""
type CoordinatorMetricsEntry {
  """Absolute path to the project root"""
  projectRoot: String!
  """Coordinator outcome metrics for this project"""
  metrics: CoordinatorMetrics!
}

# ============================================
# Health
# ============================================

"""HealthStatus represents the server health response"""
type HealthStatus {
  """Status string ("ok" when healthy)"""
  status: String!
  """When the server process started"""
  startedAt: DateTime!
}

"""ReadyCheck represents one subsystem readiness check"""
type ReadyCheck {
  """Subsystem name being checked"""
  name: String!
  """Check result ("ok" or a short problem description)"""
  status: String!
}

"""ReadyStatus represents the server readiness response"""
type ReadyStatus {
  """True when all subsystem checks pass"""
  ready: Boolean!
  """Per-subsystem readiness state"""
  checks: [ReadyCheck!]!
}

# ============================================
# Process Metrics
# ============================================

"""Window captures the time window used to scope a metrics query"""
type Window {
  """Cutoff time for the window (null means all-time)"""
  since: DateTime
}

"""SourceRef explains where a derived metric fact originated"""
type SourceRef {
  """Bead ID associated with this fact"""
  beadId: String
  """Agent session ID associated with this fact"""
  sessionId: String
  """Native (harness-specific) session identifier"""
  nativeSessionId: String
  """Native log reference for traceability"""
  nativeLogRef: String
  """SHA of the commit that closed the bead"""
  closingCommitSha: String
  """Timestamp of the source event"""
  timestamp: DateTime
  """Source system identifier"""
  source: String
}

"""AggregateSummaryBeads holds bead-level aggregate counts"""
type AggregateSummaryBeads {
  """Total number of beads"""
  total: Int!
  """Number of beads in open status"""
  open: Int!
  """Number of beads currently in progress"""
  inProgress: Int!
  """Number of closed beads"""
  closed: Int!
  """Number of beads that have been reopened"""
  reopened: Int!
  """Beads with known cycle time data"""
  knownCycleTime: Int!
  """Beads with unknown cycle time data"""
  unknownCycleTime: Int!
  """Beads with known cost data"""
  knownCost: Int!
  """Beads with estimated cost data"""
  estimatedCost: Int!
  """Beads with unknown cost data"""
  unknownCost: Int!
}

"""AggregateSummarySessions holds session-level aggregate counts"""
type AggregateSummarySessions {
  """Total number of sessions"""
  total: Int!
  """Sessions correlated to a bead"""
  correlated: Int!

correlated: Int!
  """Sessions not correlated to any bead"""
  uncorrelated: Int!
  """Total prompt/input tokens consumed"""
  inputTokens: Int!
  """Total completion/output tokens generated"""
  outputTokens: Int!
  """Total tokens (input + output)"""
  totalTokens: Int!
  """Sessions with known cost data"""
  knownCost: Int!
  """Sessions with estimated cost data"""
  estimatedCost: Int!
  """Sessions with unknown cost data"""
  unknownCost: Int!
  """Total cost in USD"""
  costUsd: Float!
}

"""AggregateSummaryCost holds cost aggregates across beads and features"""
type AggregateSummaryCost {
  """Number of beads with cost data"""
  beads: Int!
  """Number of features with cost data"""
  features: Int!
  """Total known cost in USD"""
  knownCostUsd: Float!
  """Total estimated cost in USD"""
  estimatedCostUsd: Float!
  """Number of beads with no cost data"""
  unknownBeads: Int!
}

"""AggregateSummaryCycleTime holds cycle time aggregates"""
type AggregateSummaryCycleTime {
  """Number of beads with known cycle time"""
  knownCount: Int!
  """Number of beads with unknown cycle time"""
  unknownCount: Int!
  """Average cycle time in milliseconds"""
  averageMs: Int
  """Minimum cycle time in milliseconds"""
  minMs: Int
  """Maximum cycle time in milliseconds"""
  maxMs: Int
}

"""AggregateSummaryRework holds rework/churn aggregates"""
type AggregateSummaryRework {
  """Number of beads with known closure data"""
  knownClosed: Int!
  """Number of beads known to have been reopened"""
  knownReopened: Int!
  """Number of beads with unknown rework data"""
  unknownCount: Int!
  """Ratio of reopened to total closed beads"""
  reopenRate: Float!
  """Total number of post-close revisions"""
  revisionCount: Int!
}

"""AggregateSummary is the full process-metrics summary"""
type AggregateSummary {
  """Bead-level aggregate counts"""
  beads: AggregateSummaryBeads!
  """Session-level aggregate counts"""
  sessions: AggregateSummarySessions!
  """Cost aggregates"""
  cost: AggregateSummaryCost!
  """Cycle time aggregates"""
  cycleTime: AggregateSummaryCycleTime!
  """Rework aggregates"""
  rework: AggregateSummaryRework!
}

"""CostSummary aggregates cost across all beads/features in a cost report"""
type CostSummary {
  """Number of beads with cost data"""

  """Number of features with cost data"""
  features: Int!
  """Total known cost in USD"""
  knownCostUsd: Float!
  """Total estimated cost in USD"""
  estimatedCostUsd: Float!
  """Number of beads with no cost data"""
  unknownBeads: Int!
}

"""BeadCostRow is one bead's cost attribution within a CostReport"""
type BeadCostRow {
  """Bead identifier"""

  """Bead title"""
  title: String!
  """Spec/feature ID the bead belongs to"""
  specId: String
  """Current bead status"""

  """Agent sessions contributing to this bead's cost"""

  """Total prompt/input tokens consumed"""

  """Total completion/output tokens generated"""
  outputTokens: Int!
  """Total tokens (input + output)"""
  totalTokens: Int!
  """Cost data quality: known, estimated, or unknown"""

  """Number of sessions with unknown cost"""

}

"""FeatureCostRow aggregates bead cost rows by spec/feature ID"""
type FeatureCostRow {

  """Total prompt/input tokens consumed"""
  inputTokens: Int!
  """Total completion/output tokens generated"""
  outputTokens: Int!
  """Total tokens (input + output)"""
  totalTokens: Int!
  """Cost data quality: known, estimated, or unknown"""
  costState: String!
  """Cost in USD (null if unknown)"""
  costUsd: Float
  """Number of beads with unknown cost"""
  unknownBeads: Int
}

"""CostReport describes bead and feature cost attribution over a time window"""
type CostReport {
  """Report scope (e.g. "all", "bead", "feature")"""
  scope: String!
  """Time window for the report (null means all-time)"""
  window: Window
  """Filter: specific bead ID (null for all beads)"""
  beadId: String
  """Filter: specific feature ID (null for all features)"""
  featureId: String
  """Per-bead cost rows"""
  beads: [BeadCostRow!]
  """Per-feature cost rows"""
  features: [FeatureCostRow!]
  """Aggregate cost summary"""
  summary: CostSummary!
}

"""CycleTimeSummary aggregates lifecycle timing across all beads in a report"""
type CycleTimeSummary {

  """Number of beads with unknown cycle time"""

  """Average cycle time in milliseconds"""
  averageMs: Int
  """Minimum cycle time in milliseconds"""
  minMs: Int
  """Maximum cycle time in milliseconds"""

"""CycleTimeRow describes one bead's lifecycle timing"""

"""CycleTimeReport describes lifecycle timing over a time window"""

"""ReworkSummary aggregates reopen and post-close churn"""
type ReworkSummary {
  """Number of beads with known closure data"""
  knownClosed: Int!
  """Number of beads known to have been reopened"""

  """Number of beads with unknown rework data"""
  unknownCount: Int!
  """Ratio of reopened to total closed beads"""

  """Total number of post-close revisions"""

"""ReworkRow describes reopen and revision facts for one bead"""
type ReworkRow {

# ============================================
# Providers
# ============================================

"""Provider represents an agent provider/harness configuration"""
type Provider implements Node {
  """Unique provider identifier"""
  id: ID!
  """Display name"""
  name: String!
  """Provider kind (e.g. "cli", "api")"""
  kind: String!
  """Default model for this provider"""
  defaultModel: String
  """Available model identifiers"""
  models: [String!]
  """Default effort level"""
  defaultEffort: String
  """Available effort levels"""
  effortLevels: [String!]
  """Default execution timeout in milliseconds"""
  timeoutMs: Int
  """Granted permission scopes"""
  permissions: [String!]
}

"""ProviderKind distinguishes endpoint providers from subprocess harnesses."""
enum ProviderKind {
  """API-endpoint provider configured via base URL + key (e.g. anthropic, openai-compat)."""
  ENDPOINT
  """Subprocess harness invoked via a local binary (e.g. claude, codex, gemini)."""
  HARNESS
}

"""ProviderUsage is a rolling-window token/request summary computed from the sessions index."""
type ProviderUsage {
  """Tokens recorded in sessions whose StartedAt falls in the last 60 minutes. Null when unavailable."""
  tokensUsedLastHour: Int
  """Tokens recorded in sessions whose StartedAt falls in the last 24 hours. Null when unavailable."""
  tokensUsedLast24h: Int
  """Session count in the last 60 minutes. Null when unavailable."""
  requestsLastHour: Int
  """Session count in the last 24 hours. Null when unavailable."""
  requestsLast24h: Int
}

"""ProviderQuota captures the ceiling reported by the harness/provider, when known.
All fields are nullable; null means "not reported" (no fabrication)."""
type ProviderQuota {
  """Ceiling tokens for the current window. Null when the harness/provider does not report one."""
  ceilingTokens: Int
  """Length of the quota window in seconds (e.g. 60 for per-minute ceilings)."""
  ceilingWindowSeconds: Int
  """Remaining tokens in the current window, as reported by the provider."""
  remaining: Int
  """RFC3339 timestamp when the quota window resets."""
  resetAt: String
}

"""ProviderStatus is the live connectivity status of a configured endpoint provider
or subprocess harness, mirroring the output of `ddx agent providers` and
`ddx agent list` / `ddx agent doctor`."""
type ProviderStatus {
  """Provider/harness name from agent config"""
  name: String!
  """Kind: endpoint provider or subprocess harness."""
  kind: ProviderKind!
  """Provider type (e.g. "anthropic", "openai-compat") for endpoints; binary name or surface for harnesses."""
  providerType: String!
  """API base URL for endpoints; "(subprocess)" for harnesses."""
  baseURL: String!
  """Configured model identifier"""
  model: String!
  """Live connectivity status message"""
  status: String!
  """True when the last-known status says this endpoint/harness can accept work."""
  reachable: Boolean!
  """Human-readable detail explaining the current status."""
  detail: String!
  """Number of models discovered via /v1/models (endpoints) or harness model count (harnesses)."""
  modelCount: Int!
  """True when this is the default provider/harness."""
  isDefault: Boolean!
  """RFC3339 timestamp when health cooldown expires, if on cooldown"""
  cooldownUntil: String
  """RFC3339 timestamp of the last probe result (cached or live)."""
  lastCheckedAt: String
  """Rolling usage aggregated from the sessions index. Null when sessions index is unavailable."""
  usage: ProviderUsage
  """Quota ceiling + reset from the harness/provider. Null when unreported."""
  quota: ProviderQuota
  """Profile names where this row is the default candidate (may be empty)."""
  defaultForProfile: [String!]!
}

"""ProviderTrendPoint is one time-bucketed data point of usage vs. ceiling."""
type ProviderTrendPoint {
  """RFC3339 bucket start (hour-aligned for ≤7d windows, 4-hour-aligned beyond)."""
  bucketStart: String!
  """Sum of tokens recorded in sessions whose StartedAt falls in this bucket."""
  tokens: Int!
  """Count of sessions in this bucket."""
  requests: Int!
}

"""ProviderTrend is the trend-detail payload for `/providers/[name]`."""
type ProviderTrend {
  """Provider/harness name."""
  name: String!
  """Endpoint vs harness."""
  kind: ProviderKind!
  """Window in days covered by series points."""
  windowDays: Int!
  """Time-bucketed usage points, oldest first."""
  series: [ProviderTrendPoint!]!
  """Quota ceiling tokens; null when unreported."""
  ceilingTokens: Int
  """Projected hours until the ceiling is hit, computed from the last-24h slope. Null when ceiling is unreported or slope is non-positive."""
  projectedRunOutHours: Float
}

"""DefaultRouteStatus shows which provider/model the default model-ref resolves to."""
type DefaultRouteStatus {
  """The model-ref key (e.g. "code-medium") or empty if no default configured"""
  modelRef: String!
  """Selected provider name, or null if no healthy candidate found"""
  resolvedProvider: String
  """Selected model identifier, or null if no healthy candidate found"""
  resolvedModel: String
  """Routing strategy (e.g. "first-available")"""
  strategy: String
}

"""QueueSummary is a compact project queue status for action dispatch."""
type QueueSummary {
  """Open beads with no unmet dependencies"""
  ready: Int!
  """Open beads blocked by unmet dependencies"""
  blocked: Int!
  """Beads currently claimed or executing"""
  inProgress: Int!
}

"""WorkerDispatchResult describes the worker started by an action."""
type WorkerDispatchResult {
  """Worker identifier"""
  id: ID!
  """Queued/running state"""
  state: String!
  """Worker kind"""
  kind: String!
}

"""WorkerLifecycleResult describes a lifecycle mutation result."""
type WorkerLifecycleResult {
  """Worker identifier"""
  id: ID!
  """Worker state after the mutation was accepted"""
  state: String!
  """Worker kind"""
  kind: String!
}

"""StartWorkerInput configures a project execute-loop worker."""
input StartWorkerInput {
  """Project identifier"""
  projectId: String!
  """Optional harness override"""
  harness: String
  """Routing profile, defaulting to smart when omitted"""
  profile: String
  """Reasoning effort, defaulting to medium when omitted"""
  effort: String
  """Optional label filter for ready beads"""
  labelFilter: String
}

}

"""PluginDispatchResult describes the worker started by a plugin action."""
type PluginDispatchResult {
  """Worker identifier"""
  id: ID!
  """Queued/running state"""
  state: String!
  """Plugin action requested"""
  action: String!
}

"""PersonaBindResult reports a persona binding write."""
type PersonaBindResult {
  """True when the binding was accepted"""
  ok: Boolean!
  """Role name bound"""
  role: String!
  """Persona assigned to the role"""
  persona: String!
}

"""PersonaDeleteResult reports a project-local persona delete."""
type PersonaDeleteResult {
  """True when the persona was deleted"""
  ok: Boolean!
  """Persona name that was deleted"""
  name: String!
}

"""EfficacyWarning flags a model row that needs operator attention."""
type EfficacyWarning {
  """Warning kind"""
  kind: String!
  """Numeric threshold involved in the warning"""
  threshold: Float
}

"""EfficacyRow summarizes agent performance for one harness/provider/model tuple."""
type EfficacyRow {
  """Stable row key"""
  rowKey: String!
  """Agent harness"""
  harness: String!
  """Provider name"""
  provider: String!
  """Model identifier"""
  model: String!
  """Attempt count"""
  attempts: Int!
  """Successful attempt count"""
  successes: Int!
  """Successes divided by attempts"""
  successRate: Float!
  """Median input tokens"""
  medianInputTokens: Int!
  """Median output tokens"""
  medianOutputTokens: Int!
  """Median duration in milliseconds"""
  medianDurationMs: Int!
  """Median cost in USD when known"""
  medianCostUsd: Float
  """Optional warning metadata"""
  warning: EfficacyWarning
}

"""EfficacyAttempt is one historical attempt for an efficacy row."""
type EfficacyAttempt {
  """Bead identifier"""
  beadId: String!
  """Attempt outcome"""
  outcome: String!
  """Duration in milliseconds"""
  durationMs: Int!
  """Cost in USD when known"""
  costUsd: Float
  """Execution evidence URL or path"""
  evidenceBundleUrl: String!
}

"""EfficacyAttempts groups attempt details for a row."""
type EfficacyAttempts {
  """Stable row key"""
  rowKey: String!
  """Attempts in newest-first order"""
  attempts: [EfficacyAttempt!]!
}

"""ComparisonRecord is a queued or completed model comparison."""
type ComparisonRecord {
  """Comparison identifier"""
  id: ID!
  """Comparison state"""
  state: String!
  """Number of configured arms"""
  armCount: Int!
}

"""ComparisonDispatchResult describes a queued model comparison."""
type ComparisonDispatchResult {
  """Comparison identifier"""
  id: ID!
  """Queued/running state"""
  state: String!
  """Number of configured arms"""
  armCount: Int!
}

"""PluginInfo describes one plugin registry entry."""
type PluginInfo {
  """Plugin name"""
  name: String!
  """Registry version"""
  version: String!
  """Installed version, if present"""
  installedVersion: String
  """Plugin classification"""
  type: String!
  """Short description"""
  description: String!
  """Search keywords"""
  keywords: [String!]!
  """available, installed, or update-available"""
  status: String!
  """Registry source"""
  registrySource: String!
  """Approximate disk footprint"""
  diskBytes: Int!
  """Manifest encoded as JSON text"""
  manifest: String
  """Skill names exposed by the plugin"""
  skills: [String!]!
  """Prompt names exposed by the plugin"""
  prompts: [String!]!
  """Template names exposed by the plugin"""
  templates: [String!]!
}

"""PaletteDocumentResult is a document match for the command palette."""
type PaletteDocumentResult {
  kind: String!
  path: String!
  title: String!
}

"""PaletteBeadResult is a bead match for the command palette."""
type PaletteBeadResult {
  kind: String!
  id: ID!
  title: String!
}

"""PaletteActionResult is an executable action in the command palette."""
type PaletteActionResult {
  kind: String!
  id: ID!
  label: String!
}

"""PaletteNavigationResult is a navigation target in the command palette."""
type PaletteNavigationResult {
  kind: String!
  route: String!
