}

"""PaletteSearchResults groups command palette result buckets."""
type PaletteSearchResults {
  documents: [PaletteDocumentResult!]!
  beads: [PaletteBeadResult!]!
  actions: [PaletteActionResult!]!
  navigation: [PaletteNavigationResult!]!
}

# ============================================
# Query Root
# ============================================

"""Query is the root entry point for all read operations"""
type Query {
  """Fetch any entity by its globally unique ID (Relay node interface)"""
  node(id: ID!): Node

  # ==========================================
  # Node & Project Queries
  # ==========================================

  """Return the server node information (maps to GET /api/node)"""
  nodeInfo: NodeInfo!

  """List all registered projects with cursor pagination (maps to GET /api/projects)"""
  projects(
    """Return the first N edges after the cursor"""
    first: Int,
    """Cursor to start after"""
    after: String,
    """Return the last N edges before the cursor"""
    last: Int,
    """Cursor to end before"""
    before: String,
    """Include projects whose path is unreachable"""
    includeUnreachable: Boolean
  ): ProjectConnection!

  # ==========================================
  # Bead Queries
  # ==========================================

  """List all beads with cursor pagination and optional filters (maps to GET /api/beads)"""
  beads(
    """Return the first N edges after the cursor"""
    first: Int,
    """Cursor to start after"""
    after: String,
    """Return the last N edges before the cursor"""
    last: Int,
    """Cursor to end before"""
    before: String,
    """Filter by lifecycle status"""
    status: String,
    """Filter by label"""
    label: String,
    """Filter by project ID"""
    projectID: String
  ): BeadConnection!

  """List beads for a specific project (maps to GET /api/beads with project filter)"""
  beadsByProject(
    """Project identifier to filter by"""
    projectID: String!,
    """Return the first N edges after the cursor"""
    first: Int,
    """Cursor to start after"""
    after: String,
    """Return the last N edges before the cursor"""
    last: Int,
    """Cursor to end before"""
    before: String,
    """Filter by lifecycle status"""
    status: String,
    """Filter by label"""
    label: String,
    """Search by title or ID (case-insensitive substring)"""
    search: String
  ): BeadConnection!

  """List open beads whose dependencies are all closed (maps to GET /api/beads/ready)"""
  beadsReady(
    """Return the first N edges after the cursor"""
    first: Int,
    """Cursor to start after"""
    after: String,
    """Return the last N edges before the cursor"""
    last: Int,
    """Cursor to end before"""
    before: String
  ): BeadConnection!

  """List open beads with unclosed dependencies (maps to GET /api/beads/blocked)"""
  beadsBlocked(
    """Return the first N edges after the cursor"""
    first: Int,
    """Cursor to start after"""
    after: String,
    """Return the last N edges before the cursor"""
    last: Int,
    """Cursor to end before"""
    before: String
  ): BeadConnection!

  """Return aggregate bead counts by status (maps to GET /api/beads/status)"""
  beadsStatus: BeadStatusCounts!

  """Return the dependency tree for a bead as a formatted string (maps to GET /api/beads/dep/tree/{id})"""
  beadDepTree(
    """Bead ID to compute the dependency tree for"""
    beadID: ID!
  ): String!

  """Fetch a single bead by ID (maps to GET /api/beads/{id})"""
  bead(
    """Bead identifier"""
    id: ID!
  ): Bead

  # ==========================================
  # Document Queries
  # ==========================================

  """List all library documents with cursor pagination (maps to GET /api/documents)"""
  documents(
    """Return the first N edges after the cursor"""
    first: Int,
    """Cursor to start after"""
    after: String,
    """Return the last N edges before the cursor"""
    last: Int,
    """Cursor to end before"""
    before: String,
    """Filter by document type (e.g. "prompt", "template")"""
    type: String
  ): DocumentConnection!

  """Read a single document by path (maps to GET /api/documents/{path...})"""
  documentByPath(
    """Document path relative to the library root"""
    path: String!
  ): Document

  """Return the full document dependency graph (maps to GET /api/docs/graph)"""
  docGraph: DocGraph!

  """Return only the structured integrity issues for the document graph."""
  docGraphIssues: [GraphIssue!]!

  """Return documents that are stale (maps to GET /api/docs/stale)"""
  docStale: [StaleReason!]!

  """Return the dependency IDs of a document (maps to GET /api/docs/{id}/deps)"""
  docDeps(
    """Document identifier"""
    documentID: ID!
  ): [String!]!

  """Return the dependent IDs of a document (maps to GET /api/docs/{id}/dependents)"""
  docDependents(
    """Document identifier"""
    documentID: ID!
  ): [String!]!

  """Return the git history for a document with cursor pagination (maps to GET /api/docs/{id}/history)"""
  docHistory(
    """Document identifier"""
    documentID: ID!,
    """Return the first N edges after the cursor"""
    first: Int,
    """Cursor to start after"""
    after: String,
    """Return the last N edges before the cursor"""
    last: Int,
    """Cursor to end before"""
    before: String
  ): CommitConnection!

  """Return the diff for a document (maps to GET /api/docs/{id}/diff)"""
  docDiff(
    """Document identifier"""
    documentID: ID!,
    """Git ref to diff against (default: HEAD)"""
    ref: String
  ): String!

  """Fetch a single document by ID (maps to GET /api/docs/{id})"""
  doc(
    """Document identifier"""
    id: ID!
  ): Document

  """Search library documents (maps to GET /api/search)"""
  search(
    """Search query string"""
    query: String!,
    """Return the first N edges after the cursor"""
    first: Int,
    """Cursor to start after"""
    after: String,
    """Return the last N edges before the cursor"""
    last: Int,
    """Cursor to end before"""
    before: String
  ): SearchResultConnection!

  # ==========================================
  # Commit Queries
  # ==========================================

  """List git commits for a project with cursor pagination (maps to GET /api/projects/{project}/commits)"""
  commits(
    """Project identifier"""
    projectID: ID!,
    """Return the first N edges after the cursor"""
    first: Int,
    """Cursor to start after"""
    after: String,
    """Return the last N edges before the cursor"""
    last: Int,
    """Cursor to end before"""
    before: String,
    """Filter commits since this date (ISO-8601)"""
    since: String,
    """Filter by author name or email"""
    author: String
  ): CommitConnection!

  # ==========================================
  # Worker Queries
  # ==========================================

  """List all workers with cursor pagination (maps to GET /api/agent/workers)"""
  workers(
    """Return the first N edges after the cursor"""

"""Return the first N edges after the cursor"""
    first: Int,
    """Cursor to start after"""
    after: String,
    """Return the last N edges before the cursor"""
    last: Int,
    """Cursor to end before"""
    before: String
  ): WorkerConnection!

  """List workers for a specific project (maps to GET /api/projects/{project}/workers)"""
  workersByProject(
    """Project identifier"""
    projectID: String!,
    """Return the first N edges after the cursor"""
    first: Int,
    """Cursor to start after"""
    after: String,
    """Return the last N edges before the cursor"""
    last: Int,
    """Cursor to end before"""
    before: String
  ): WorkerConnection!

  """
  Fetch a single worker by ID (maps to GET /api/agent/workers/{id} and GET /api/projects/{project}/workers/{id})
  """
  worker(
    """Worker identifier"""
    id: ID!
  ): Worker

  """
  Return recent phase transitions for a worker (maps to GET /api/projects/{project}/workers/{id}/progress)
  """
  workerProgress(
    """Worker identifier"""
    workerID: ID!
  ): [PhaseTransition!]!

  """Return captured stdout/stderr from a worker (maps to GET /api/agent/workers/{id}/log)"""
  workerLog(
    """Worker identifier"""
    workerID: ID!
  ): WorkerLog!

  """
  Return the prompt text for a worker's current or last attempt (maps to GET /api/agent/workers/{id}/prompt)
  """
  workerPrompt(
    """Worker identifier"""
    workerID: ID!
  ): String!

  # ==========================================
  # Agent Session Queries
  # ==========================================

  """List all agent sessions with cursor pagination (maps to GET /api/agent/sessions)"""
  agentSessions(
    """Return the first N edges after the cursor"""
    first: Int,
    """Cursor to start after"""
    after: String,
    """Return the last N edges before the cursor"""
    last: Int,
    """Cursor to end before"""
    before: String
    """Only include sessions starting at or after this timestamp"""
    startedAfter: DateTime
    """Only include sessions starting before this timestamp"""
    startedBefore: DateTime
  ): AgentSessionConnection!

  """Fetch a single agent session by ID (maps to GET /api/agent/sessions/{id})"""
  agentSession(
    """Session identifier"""
    id: ID!
  ): AgentSession

  """Summarize session cost buckets for one project"""
  sessionsCostSummary(
    """Project identifier"""
    projectId: ID!
    """Only include sessions starting at or after this timestamp"""
    since: DateTime
    """Only include sessions starting before this timestamp"""
    until: DateTime
  ): SessionsCostSummary!

  # ==========================================
  # Persona Queries
  # ==========================================

  """List all personas as a flat array (maps to GET /api/personas).

  When projectId is provided, project-local personas under the given
  project's `.ddx/personas` are included and override library personas
  of the same name."""
  personas(
    """Optional project identifier to scope project-local personas"""
    projectId: String
  ): [Persona!]!

  """Fetch a single persona by name (maps to GET /api/personas)"""
  persona(
    """Persona name"""
    name: String!,
    """Optional project identifier to prefer project-local lookup"""
    projectId: String
  ): Persona

  """Resolve the persona bound to a role (maps to GET /api/personas/{role})"""
  personaByRole(
    """Role name to resolve"""
    role: String!
  ): Persona

  # ==========================================
  # Execution Queries
  # ==========================================

  """List execution definitions with cursor pagination (maps to GET /api/exec/definitions)"""
  execDefinitions(
    """Return the first N edges after the cursor"""
    first: Int,
    """Cursor to start after"""
    after: String,
    """Return the last N edges before the cursor"""
    last: Int,
    """Cursor to end before"""
    before: String,
    """Filter by artifact ID"""
    artifactID: String
  ): ExecutionDefinitionConnection!

  """Fetch a single execution definition by ID (maps to GET /api/exec/definitions/{id})"""
  execDefinition(
    """Definition identifier"""
    id: ID!
  ): ExecutionDefinition

  """List execution runs with cursor pagination (maps to GET /api/exec/runs)"""
  execRuns(
    """Return the first N edges after the cursor"""
    first: Int,
    """Cursor to start after"""
    after: String,
    """Return the last N edges before the cursor"""
    last: Int,
    """Cursor to end before"""
    before: String,
    """Filter by artifact ID"""
    artifactID: String,
    """Filter by definition ID"""
    definitionID: String
  ): ExecutionRunConnection!

  """Fetch a single execution run by ID (maps to GET /api/exec/runs/{id})"""
  execRun(
    """Run identifier"""
    id: ID!
  ): ExecutionRun

  """Return the log for an execution run (maps to GET /api/exec/runs/{id}/log)"""
  execRunLog(
    """Run identifier"""
    runID: ID!
  ): ExecutionRunLog!

  # ==========================================
  # Health Queries
  # ==========================================

  """Return server health status (maps to GET /api/health)"""
  health: HealthStatus!

  """Return per-subsystem readiness checks (maps to GET /api/ready)"""
  ready: ReadyStatus!

  # ==========================================
  # Coordinator Queries
  # ==========================================

  """Return metrics for every active land coordinator (maps to GET /api/agent/coordinators)"""
  coordinators: [CoordinatorMetricsEntry!]!

  """
  Return the coordinator metrics for a specific project root.
  Restores the single-project variant requested by the prior review.
  Returns null when no coordinator has been observed for the given project root.
  """
  coordinatorMetricsByProject(
    """Absolute project root path (matches CoordinatorMetricsEntry.projectRoot)"""
    projectRoot: String!
  ): CoordinatorMetrics

  # ==========================================
  # Metrics Queries
  # ==========================================

  """Return aggregate process metrics summary (maps to GET /api/metrics/summary)"""
  metricsSummary(
    """ISO-8601 cutoff; only include data after this time"""
    since: String
  ): AggregateSummary!

  """Return bead and feature cost attribution (maps to GET /api/metrics/cost)"""
  metricsCost(
    """ISO-8601 cutoff"""
    since: String,
    """Filter to a specific bead"""
    bead: String,
    """Filter to a specific feature"""
    feature: String
  ): CostReport!

  """Return lifecycle timing data (maps to GET /api/metrics/cycle-time)"""
  metricsCycleTime(
    """ISO-8601 cutoff"""
    since: String
  ): CycleTimeReport!

  """Return reopen and post-close churn data (maps to GET /api/metrics/rework)"""
  metricsRework(
    """ISO-8601 cutoff"""
    since: String
  ): ReworkReport!

  # ==========================================
  # Provider Queries
  # ==========================================

  """List all agent providers (maps to GET /api/providers)"""
  providers: [Provider!]!

  """Fetch a single provider by harness name (maps to GET /api/providers/{harness})"""
  provider(
    """Harness/provider name"""
    name: String!
  ): Provider

  """List configured API providers with live connectivity status (mirrors `ddx agent providers`)"""
  providerStatuses: [ProviderStatus!]!

  """List subprocess harnesses with live reachability, kind=HARNESS. Equivalent surface to `ddx agent list` + `ddx agent doctor`."""
  harnessStatuses: [ProviderStatus!]!

  """Show which provider/model the default model-ref resolves to (mirrors `ddx agent route-status`)"""
  defaultRouteStatus: DefaultRouteStatus

  """Return a time-bucketed trend of tokens and requests for a provider or harness."""
  providerTrend(
    """Provider or harness name."""
    name: String!
    """Window in days (7 or 30)."""
    windowDays: Int! = 7
  ): ProviderTrend

  """Return compact queue counts for a project."""
  queueSummary(
    """Project identifier"""
    projectId: String!
  ): QueueSummary!

  """Return model efficacy rows."""
  efficacyRows(
    """Filter sessions started at or after this ISO-8601 timestamp."""
    since: String
    """Filter sessions started before this ISO-8601 timestamp."""
    until: String
    """Project identifier whose session index should be read."""
    projectId: String
  ): [EfficacyRow!]!

  """Return attempt details for one efficacy row."""
  efficacyAttempts(
    """Stable efficacy row key"""
    rowKey: String!
    """Filter sessions started at or after this ISO-8601 timestamp."""
    since: String
    """Filter sessions started before this ISO-8601 timestamp."""
    until: String
    """Project identifier whose session index should be read."""
    projectId: String
  ): EfficacyAttempts!

  """Return model comparison records."""
  comparisons: [ComparisonRecord!]!

  """Return plugin registry entries."""
  pluginsList: [PluginInfo!]!

  """Return one plugin registry entry."""
  pluginDetail(
    """Plugin name"""
    name: String!
  ): PluginInfo

  """Return persona bindings for a project as JSON text."""
  projectBindings(
    """Project identifier"""
    projectId: String!
  ): String!

  """Search command palette documents, beads, actions, and navigation."""
  paletteSearch(
    """Search query"""
    query: String!
  ): PaletteSearchResults!
}

# ============================================
# Mutations
# ============================================

"""Mutation is the root entry point for all write operations"""
type Mutation {
  """Create a new bead (maps to POST /api/beads)"""
  beadCreate(input: BeadInput!): Bead!

  """Update an existing bead (maps to POST /api/beads/{id})"""
  beadUpdate(
    """Bead ID to update"""
    id: ID!,
    """Fields to update"""
    input: BeadUpdateInput!
  ): Bead!

  """Claim a bead for execution (maps to POST /api/beads/{id}/claim)"""
  beadClaim(
    """Bead ID to claim"""
    id: ID!,
    """Agent or human identifier claiming the bead"""
    assignee: String!
  ): Bead!

  """Unclaim a bead (maps to POST /api/beads/{id}/unclaim)"""
  beadUnclaim(
    """Bead ID to unclaim"""
    id: ID!
  ): Bead!

  """Reopen a closed bead (maps to POST /api/beads/{id}/reopen)"""
  beadReopen(
    """Bead ID to reopen"""
    id: ID!
  ): Bead!

  """Close a bead."""
  beadClose(
    """Bead ID to close"""
    id: ID!,
    """Operator-provided reason"""
    reason: String
  ): Bead!

  """Write or update a document in the library (maps to PUT /api/docs/{id})"""
  documentWrite(
    """Document path relative to the library root"""
    path: String!,
    """Document content"""
    content: String!
  ): Document!

  """Dispatch a project worker action."""
  workerDispatch(
    """Worker kind: execute-loop, realign-specs, or run-checks"""
    kind: String!,
    """Project identifier"""
    projectId: String!,
    """Optional JSON-encoded arguments"""
    args: String
  ): WorkerDispatchResult!

  """Start a project execute-loop worker."""
  startWorker(input: StartWorkerInput!): WorkerDispatchResult!

  """Stop a running worker through the same path as ddx agent workers stop."""
  stopWorker(id: ID!): WorkerLifecycleResult!

  """Dispatch a plugin install/update/uninstall action."""
  pluginDispatch(
    """Plugin name"""
    name: String!,
    """Plugin action"""
    action: String!,
    """Install scope"""
    scope: String!
  ): PluginDispatchResult!

  """Dispatch a model comparison."""
  comparisonDispatch(
    """Comparison arms"""
    arms: [ComparisonArmInput!]!
  ): ComparisonDispatchResult!

  """Bind a role to a persona for a project."""
  personaBind(
    """Role name"""
    role: String!,
    """Persona name"""
    persona: String!,
    """Project identifier"""
    projectId: String!
  ): PersonaBindResult!

  """Create a new project-local persona. Library personas cannot be created via this API."""
  personaCreate(
    """Unique persona name (also used as the file name)"""
    name: String!,
    """Markdown body including YAML frontmatter"""
    body: String!,
    """Project identifier to create the persona under"""
    projectId: String!
  ): Persona!

  """Update an existing project-local persona. Errors on library personas."""
  personaUpdate(
    """Persona name to update"""
    name: String!,
    """Markdown body including YAML frontmatter"""
    body: String!,
    """Project identifier whose persona to update"""
    projectId: String!
  ): Persona!

  """Delete a project-local persona. Errors on library personas."""
  personaDelete(
    """Persona name to delete"""
    name: String!,
    """Project identifier whose persona to delete"""
    projectId: String!
  ): PersonaDeleteResult!

  """Fork a library persona into the project-local directory. Returns the new project persona."""
  personaFork(
    """Library persona name to copy"""
    libraryName: String!,
    """Optional new persona name; defaults to the library name"""
    newName: String,
    """Project identifier to fork into"""
    projectId: String!
  ): Persona!
}

# ============================================
# Input Types for Mutations
# ============================================

"""Input type for creating a new bead"""
input BeadInput {
  """Short summary of the work"""
  title: String!
  """Lifecycle status (default: "open")"""
  status: String
  """Numeric priority (default: 2)"""
  priority: Int
  """Issue classification (e.g. "task", "bug")"""
  issueType: String
  """Freeform labels for filtering and grouping"""

"""Freeform labels for filtering and grouping"""
  labels: [String!]
  """Parent bead ID for hierarchy"""
  parent: String
  """Full description / body text"""
  description: String
  """Acceptance criteria text"""
  acceptance: String
  """Freeform notes appended during work"""
  notes: String
}

"""Input type for updating an existing bead"""
input BeadUpdateInput {
  """Short summary of the work"""
  title: String
  """Lifecycle status"""
  status: String
  """Numeric priority"""
  priority: Int
  """Issue classification"""
  issueType: String
  """Freeform labels for filtering and grouping"""
  labels: [String!]
  """Parent bead ID for hierarchy"""
  parent: String
  """Full description / body text"""
  description: String
  """Acceptance criteria text"""
  acceptance: String
  """Freeform notes appended during work"""
  notes: String
}

"""ComparisonArmInput is one requested comparison arm."""
input ComparisonArmInput {
  """Agent harness"""
  harness: String
  """Provider name"""
  provider: String
  """Model identifier"""
  model: String!
  """Prompt or task text"""
  prompt: String!
}

# ============================================
# Subscriptions
# ============================================

"""Subscription is the root entry point for all real-time events"""
type Subscription {
  """Stream progress events for a worker (maps to GET /api/projects/{project}/workers/{id}/progress SSE)"""
  workerProgress(
    """Worker identifier"""
    workerID: ID!
  ): WorkerEvent!

  """Stream bead lifecycle events for a project (maps to bead store AppendEvent)"""
  beadLifecycle(
    """Project root path to monitor for bead events"""
    projectID: ID!
  ): BeadEvent!

  """Stream execution evidence (stdout/stderr) for a run (maps to GET /api/exec/runs/{id}/log)"""
  executionEvidence(
    """Run identifier"""
    runID: ID!
  ): ExecutionEvent!

  """Stream coordinator metrics updates (maps to land coordinator event hook)"""
  coordinatorMetrics(
    """Project root path"""
    projectRoot: String!
  ): CoordinatorMetricsUpdate!
}

# ============================================
# Event Types for Subscriptions
# ============================================

"""WorkerEvent is a progress or lifecycle event from a worker"""
type WorkerEvent {
  """Unique event identifier"""
  eventID: ID!
  """Worker that emitted this event"""
  workerID: String!
  """Current execution phase (e.g. "pending", "running", "done")"""
  phase: String!
  """Timestamp of the event"""
  timestamp: DateTime!
  """Log line output from the worker (if any)"""
  logLine: String
  """Bead ID being executed (null if not executing a bead)"""
  beadID: String
}

"""BeadEvent is an immutable execution evidence entry from the bead store"""
type BeadEvent {
  """Unique event identifier (bead ID + sequence)"""
  eventID: ID!
  """Bead ID that emitted this event"""
  beadID: String!
  """Event kind (e.g. "claim", "unclaim", "reopen", "summary")"""
  kind: String!
  """Human-readable summary of the event"""
  summary: String
  """Full body text (e.g. agent output, metadata changes)"""
  body: String
  """Actor that triggered this event (agent name or human name)"""
  actor: String
  """Timestamp of the event"""
  timestamp: DateTime!
}

"""ExecutionEvent is a log output from an execution run"""
type ExecutionEvent {
  """Unique event identifier (run ID + sequence)"""
  eventID: ID!
  """Run that emitted this event"""
  runID: String!
  """Output stream (stdout or stderr)"""
  stream: String!
  """Log line content"""
  line: String!
  """Timestamp of the event"""
  timestamp: DateTime!
}

"""CoordinatorMetricsUpdate is a metrics snapshot from a land coordinator"""
type CoordinatorMetricsUpdate {
  """Unique update identifier"""
  updateID: ID!
  """Project root these metrics belong to"""
  projectRoot: String!
  """Timestamp of the update"""
  timestamp: DateTime!
  """Number of submissions successfully merged"""
  landed: Int!
  """Number of submissions kept in a separate worktree"""
  preserved: Int!
  """Number of submissions that failed"""
  failed: Int!
  """Number of submissions that failed to push"""
  pushFailed: Int!
  """Sum of all submission durations in milliseconds"""
  totalDurationMs: Int!
  """Total commits across all submissions"""
  totalCommits: Int!
}

# Location of all your GraphQL files (relative to this config file's directory)
schema:
  - schema.graphql

# Location where the generated server code will be written
exec:
  filename: generated.go
  package: graphql

# Configuration for resolvers generated by gqlgen
resolver:
  filename: resolver.go
  package: graphql
  type: Resolver

# Location of the models
model:
  filename: models.go
  package: graphql

data.text: The implementation shape is now clear: a small worktree inventory package can own git parsing, manifest/result correlation, state classification, and deletion; GraphQL/CLI/UI then call that package. I’ll add it as a shared server-side surface so the CLI and mutation use the same removal path.

data.text: The hook uncovered a real test fragility under `go test -race ./...`: the worktree fixture helper can see a non-worktree Git context from the surrounding repo. I’m tightening the fixture setup so the tests are isolated from ambient Git env/config, then I’ll rerun the focused tests and commit hook.

data.output:
# Lefthook configuration for DDx project
# Fast, cross-platform git hooks
# https://github.com/evilmartians/lefthook

# Configuration
colors: true
no_tty: false
assertion: false

# Reusable command groups
command_groups:
  go_checks: &go_checks
    root: "cli/"  # Go module root
    tags: [go, backend]

  security_checks: &security_checks
    tags: [security]

  formatting_checks: &formatting_checks
    tags: [format, style]

# ====================
# Pre-commit hooks - Fast checks on staged files
# ====================
pre-commit:
  parallel: true

  commands:
    # Conflict detection using grep on staged files only.
    # Uses git diff --cached directly to avoid {staged_files} tty/expansion issues
    # when running detached (e.g. ddx work --local, no controlling tty).
    conflicts:
      name: "Check merge conflicts"
      run: |
        files=$(git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR 2>/dev/null)
        [ -z "$files" ] && exit 0
        conflict_file=$(printf '%s\n' "$files" | while IFS= read -r f; do
          [ -f "$f" ] || continue
          grep -lE "^<<<<<<<[ 	]|^=======$|^>>>>>>>[ 	]|^\|{7}[ 	]" "$f" 2>/dev/null && break
        done | head -1)
        if [ -n "$conflict_file" ]; then
          echo "Conflict markers found in: $conflict_file"
          exit 1
        fi
        exit 0
      fail_text: "Merge conflict markers found. Resolve conflicts before committing."

    # Debug statements - using ripgrep if available, fallback to grep
    # Note: Disabled because CLI applications legitimately use fmt.Print for output
    # debug-go:
    #   name: "Debug statements (Go)"
    #   glob: "*.go"
    #   exclude: "*_test.go"
    #   run: |
    #     if command -v rg >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    #       rg -q "(fmt\.Print|println|spew\.Dump|pprof\.|debug\.Print)" {staged_files} && exit 1 || exit 0
    #     else
    #       grep -E "(fmt\.Print|println|spew\.Dump|pprof\.|debug\.Print)" {staged_files} 2>/dev/null && exit 1 || exit 0
    #     fi
    #   fail_text: "Debug statements found in Go files"

    debug-python:
      name: "Debug statements (Python)"
      glob: "*.py"
      run: |
        if command -v rg >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          rg -q "(print\(|pdb\.set_trace|breakpoint\(\)|import pdb)" {staged_files} && exit 1 || exit 0
        else
          grep -E "(print\(|pdb\.set_trace|breakpoint\(\)|import pdb)" {staged_files} 2>/dev/null && exit 1 || exit 0
        fi
      fail_text: "Debug statements found in Python files"

    # Go formatting - native gofmt
    go-fmt:
      <<: *go_checks
      name: "Go Format"
      glob: "cli/**/*.go"
      run: |
        unformatted=$(gofmt -l {staged_files})
        if [ -n "$unformatted" ]; then
          echo "Files need formatting: $unformatted"
          echo "Run: gofmt -w <files>"
          exit 1
        fi
      skip:
        - merge
        - rebase

    # Go linting - golangci-lint required
    go-lint:
      <<: *go_checks
      name: "Go Lint"
      glob: "cli/**/*.go"
      run: |
        if ! command -v golangci-lint >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          echo "❌ golangci-lint is required but not installed"
          echo "Run: scripts/dev-setup.sh"
          exit 1
        fi
        # Run on packages containing staged files, not individual files
        packages=$(echo {staged_files} | xargs -n1 dirname | sort -u | sed 's|^cli/|./|')
        for pkg in $packages; do
          golangci-lint run --timeout=60s --new-from-rev=HEAD~1 "$pkg"
        done
      skip:
        - merge
        - rebase

    # Go build - only for changed packages
    go-build:
      <<: *go_checks
      name: "Go Build"
      glob: "cli/**/*.go"
      run: 'go build -v ./...'
      skip:
        - merge
        - rebase

    # Go tests - targeted testing
    go-test:
      <<: *go_checks
      name: "Go Tests"
      glob: "cli/**/*.go"
      run: |
        packages=$(echo {staged_files} | xargs -n1 dirname | sort -u | sed 's|^cli/||')
        for pkg in $packages; do
          if ls "$pkg"/*_test.go >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            go test -short -race "./$pkg"
          fi
        done
      skip:
        - merge
        - rebase
      env:
        SKIP_INTEGRATION_TESTS: "true"

    # Secrets scanning - prefer gitleaks when available
    secrets:
      <<: *security_checks
      name: "Scan for secrets"
      run: |
        if command -v gitleaks >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          gitleaks protect --staged --verbose --redact
        else
          # Fallback to staged-added-line pattern matching when gitleaks is absent.
          # Scanning whole tracker JSONL files causes noisy false positives on prose.
          added_lines=$(git diff --cached --unified=0 --no-color -- {staged_files} | grep '^+' | grep -v '^+++')

          patterns='((api[_-]?key|apikey|secret|password|passwd|pwd|credential|private[_-]?key|access[_-]?token|auth[_-]?token)[[:space:]]*[:=][[:space:]]*["'"'"'][A-Za-z0-9_./+=-]{20,})|(Authorization:[[:space:]]*Bearer[[:space:]]+[A-Za-z0-9._-]{20,})'
          if printf '%s\n' "$added_lines" | grep -E "$patterns"; then
            echo "Potential secrets detected"
            exit 1
          fi

          # AWS keys
          if printf '%s\n' "$added_lines" | grep -E 'AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}'; then
            echo "AWS key pattern detected"
            exit 1
          fi

          # GitHub tokens
          if printf '%s\n' "$added_lines" | grep -E 'ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}'; then
            echo "GitHub token pattern detected"
            exit 1
          fi
        fi
      exclude:
        - "*.md"
        - "go.sum"
        - "package-lock.json"
        - "*_test.go"
        - "**/dist/**"
        - "scripts/test-secrets-fallback.sh"
      fail_text: "Secrets detected! Remove them or add to .gitleaks.toml if false positive"

    # Binary and large file check
    large-files:
      name: "Check file sizes"
      run: |
        for file in {staged_files}; do
          size=$(stat -f%z "$file" 2>/dev/null || stat -c%s "$file" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
          if [ "$size" -gt 5242880 ]; then
            echo "Large file detected: $file ($(($size / 1048576))MB)"
            exit 1
          fi
        done
      exclude:
        - "*.png"
        - "*.jpg"
        - "*.jpeg"
        - "*.gif"
        - "*.svg"
        - "*.ico"
        - "*.pdf"
        - "*.woff"
        - "*.woff2"
        - "*.ttf"
        - "*.eot"
      fail_text: "Large files detected. Use Git LFS for files over 5MB"

    # DDx validation - only when relevant files change
    ddx-validate:
      name: "Validate DDx"
      run: |
        # Only run if DDx files are staged
        if ! git diff --cached --name-only | grep -qE '(\.ddx\.yml|templates/|patterns/|prompts/)'; then
          exit 0
        fi

        # Check for DDx command availability
        if command -v ddx >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          ddx doctor >/dev/null 2>&1
        elif [ -x "./cli/ddx" ]; then
          ./cli/ddx doctor >/dev/null 2>&1
        fi
      fail_text: "DDx validation failed. Run 'ddx doctor' for details"

    skill-schema:
      <<: *go_checks
      name: "Validate skill metadata"

data.text: The hook failure points to the production code too: package-level git calls inherit `GIT_WORK_TREE`, so a surrounding hook environment can make inventory scan the wrong repository. I’m moving the Git environment isolation into the worktree package itself and reusing it from tests.
